_description: Mage: The Ascension Character Sheet Template - All fields for database integration
template_usage: Fill this template and import with: php tools/repeatable/php/database-tools/import_mage_characters.php path/to/this_file.json (or ?file=filename.json in browser). character_name is required. All keys map to mage_characters table. See reference/Characters/Mage/README_mage_template.md for field-to-table mapping.

_field_documentation.tradition: STRING - Tradition or Convention (e.g. Order of Hermes, Virtual Adepts, Celestial Chorus, Orphan)
_field_documentation.paradigm: STRING - Character's paradigm (worldview through which magic works)
_field_documentation.practice: STRING - Magical practice (e.g. High Ritual, Techgnosis)
_field_documentation.spheres: OBJECT - Sphere name to level (1-5). MtA: Correspondence, Entropy, Forces, Life, Matter, Mind, Prime, Spirit, Time
_field_documentation.arete: INTEGER - Enlightenment rating (1-10), limits sphere dice pools
_field_documentation.quintessence: OBJECT - current, max, pool (or node/tass source)

_example_values.paradigm: Reality is a series of symbols; correct symbolism shapes reality
